hooks.text: You think there is one way to send money to your supplier in China. There are actually three, and your bank quietly put you on the slowest one.
Your money can take three different roads to reach your supplier in China. Two of them are faster than the one you are using right now.
One of these payment roads moved over twenty trillion dollars last year and still gets your money there same day. Most business owners have never heard of it.
A business owner waits five days for a payment to land in China. Another sends the same money and the supplier has it that day. Same country, same supplier, different road.
If you only know one way to pay China, you are losing days on every order. Two faster roads exist, and nobody at your bank is going to mention them.
